issues.description: Action should be 'TrashFromHand' targeting the Character itself (this card), not searching for other cards to trash. The effect is '[Activate: Main] You may trash this Character' — the card itself must be trashed as the cost/condition.
Filter should target 'this card' (the Character being activated), not other SWORD-type Characters. The 'excludeSelf:true' contradicts the intent to trash this card.

The 'thenActions' structure is incorrect. Should be a single conditional action sequence: if this card is trashed, then play up to 1 SWORD-type Character from hand OR trash. Current DSL chains PlayFromHand only after the trash, but does not properly express 'from your hand or trash' as alternative sources.
The DSL does not express that the player may trash this card (optional). The effect requires a condition that allows the player to choose whether to pay the cost.
